memory.recent_lessons_md:
### 2026-05-20 — NVDA earnings tonight (was estimated May 21)

- NVDA reports Q1 FY2027 TONIGHT after close. Prior notes said May 21 — verify dates from primary sources.
- Moody's US downgrade (Aaa→Aa1) over May 16-17 weekend. 30yr Treasury briefly 5.01%. Portfolio 85.5% cash acted as accidental hedge.
- AMD at $414 (from $477 peak) = better entry than $445 prior estimate. Still blocked by API.
- 5-day silent failure gap May 15-19. Strategy switch (close TSM/NVDA/JPM/AVGO) still unconfirmed.

### 2026-05-13 — PPI shock + PLTR support break

- April PPI +1.4% vs +0.5% expected — largest monthly jump since 2022. S&P rose +0.69% anyway (tech-led, narrow breadth).
- PLTR -4.31% ($136→$129.99). $134 support broken. Re-scored 6.50 (Technical 3). SKIP until reclaim of $134.
- AMD pullback from $477 to $448 normalizes RSI to ~60. Re-score 7.33 (Technical improved from 5→6). MUST ENTER.
- 7th consecutive API-blocked routine. AMD MOC attempted 19:42:21Z — HTTP 403. Guardrail violation continues.

### 2026-05-01 — Operator-mandated deployment bias correction

- Score ≥ 7 = enter at next routine. Only 3 valid skip exemptions.
